steps.description: Click on the search input field within the "Samples" section of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface to activate it for text entry.
Type text: 'coffee agent' into the search bar located at the top of the "Samples" tab within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.

Click the "Create" button associated with the "Coffee ..." featured sample in the "Samples" section of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.And input ${{var:app_name:coffee-agent}} into the run time variable.
Click the "Customize Your Order" button located under the "Current Order" section in the CoffeeAgentlocal chat interface within Microsoft Teams.
Type 'test' into the 'Your Name:' input field of the 'Submit Your Order' dialog box within the CoffeeAgentLocal interface in Microsoft Teams.
Click the "Submit Your Order" button in the CoffeeAgentlocal popup window within the Microsoft Teams web application interface.
Click the "Close" button (red cross) at the top-right corner of the confirmation dialog box, labeled "Submit Your Order," in the CoffeeAgentLocal interface within Microsoft Teams.
